title: Monitor and troubleshoot an Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL solution
summary: Monitor and troubleshoot an Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL solution

sections.title: Monitor and troubleshoot an Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL solution
sections.summary: Monitor and troubleshoot an Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL solution

lessons.title: Measure performance in Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL
lessons.content_md:
We learn to use Azure Monitor to create and analyze monitoring data for Azure Cosmos DB.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/measure-performance-azure-cosmos-db-sql-api/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Measure performance in Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL

lessons.title: Monitor responses and events in Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL
lessons.content_md:
We will learn to use a rich set of REST response codes returned by Azure Cosmos DB request to help you analyze potential issues.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/monitor-responses-events-azure-cosmos-db-sql-api/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Monitor responses and events in Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL

lessons.title: Implement backup and restore for Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to use the two backup models Azure Cosmos DB provides.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/implement-backup-restore-for-azure-cosmos-db-sql-api/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Implement backup and restore for Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL

lessons.title: Implement security in Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL
lessons.content_md:
We will learn the different security models that Azure Cosmos DB uses.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/implement-security-azure-cosmos-db-sql-api/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Implement security in Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Monitor and troubleshoot an Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL solution
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Monitor and troubleshoot an Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL solution**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
